assertion.text: Is the protective effect of ApoE Christchurch reproducible beyond the single reported PSEN1 E280A kindred case?

evidence_spans.text: The note generalizes from what appears to be a singular clinical observation without addressing replication or dosage (heterozygous vs homozygous).

confidence.basis: notes_compiler: open question, no evidence yet

provenance.title: ApoE Christchurch variant may be protective even with PSEN1 mutations.md

annotations.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.85 · evidence 0.50 · scope 0.80 · duplicate-risk 0.30. Well-posed open question about replication of the ApoE Christchurch protective effect beyond the single PSEN1 E280A case. Concerns: Evidence span is meta-commentary, not a verbatim quote from the source; Could specify dosage (heterozygous vs homozygous) more precisely in the question itself.
